all.description: Every product and stock movement references a unit from this list.

types.description: Unit types (e.g. Mass, Volume, Count) group units and keep conversions within the same type.

conversions.description: Link units with a numeric factor so the app can convert stock and quantities consistently.

all.title: No units yet
all.description: Create units you sell or stock in (kg, pcs, boxes). You can add an optional symbol and type.

types.title: No unit types yet
types.description: Add types such as Mass, Volume, or Count so conversions stay within compatible units.

conversions.title: No standard conversions yet
conversions.description: Add a row for each pair you need (for example 1 kg = 1000 g) so quantities convert automatically.

unit.title: Delete unit
unit.message: Delete this unit? Products using it will be blocked.

unitType.title: Delete unit type
unitType.message: Delete this type? Units using it must be reassigned first.

form.symbolPlaceholderAdd: e.g. g, kg; if empty, full name is used
form.factorLabel: Factor (1 from unit = factor × to unit)

async.errorDescription: This list could not be loaded. Check your connection and try again.
